backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that handles contact form submissions with CRUD operations (submit, get all, filter by project type/email, delete) and includes blob storage mixin functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three portfolio-related features: fixing image paths for 60 gallery images, adding error handling/fallback UI, and verifying static asset rendering.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of frontend files describing enhanced styling, scroll animations, navigation, hero section, services, portfolio gallery with 9 images, about section, contact form, footer, and custom hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Casa Di Vida application with viewport meta tag and root div mounting point for React.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that composes Navigation, Hero, Services, Portfolio, About, Contact, and Footer sections into a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component with asymmetric 60/40 layout displaying company philosophy and four core values (Passion, Excellence, Collaboration, Innovation) with scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact form component with validation, toast notifications, project type selection, and contact information display using React Query mutation for backend submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with brand logo, quick navigation links, social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn), copyright notice, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component with background image, logo, heading, tagline, and two CTA buttons that scroll to portfolio and contact sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with logo, desktop menu links, and mobile sheet menu that tracks active section on scroll and smoothly scrolls to sections.
frontend/src/components/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio gallery component with category filtering (residential, commercial, before-after) displaying 9 projects total with image validation in dev mode.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying 6 interior design services (space planning, color consultation, furniture selection, etc.) in a responsive card grid with scroll animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor, switching between authenticated and anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and identity persistence using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting contact form data to the backend actor with automatic query invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook using IntersectionObserver to trigger animations when elements scroll into view, with support for reduced motion preferences.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm, sophisticated color palette for luxury interior design (browns, creams, terracotta) in both light and dark modes, plus scroll animation utilities and typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root render with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, custom font families (Inter, Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond), elegant shadows, custom spacing, and animation keyframes for accordions and fade effects.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking the Casa Di Vida interior design website with multiple gallery sections, modern minimalist design, and a known issue where gallery images are not displaying (showing dark blank spaces instead).
